description: Design tokens for Hooikoortsvandaag.nl — Apple-like, modern, minimal. Single source of truth for layout, type, and color.

background.description: Off-white / light beige — main page background

surface.description: Cards and inputs on top of page background

text.description: Primary = headlines and key copy; secondary = body; tertiary = captions, hints

accent.description: Orange-brown for 'vandaag' and key emphasis (not severity)

level.description: Pollen/severity: green → orange → red → dark red; grey = niet actief

gradient.description: Belasting vandaag bar: light orange to dark red

ui.description: Borders, focus ring, Tips & advies button

fontFamily.description: Clean system-style sans; Geist or system fallback

scale.description: Modular scale ratio 1.25 from 16px base (Major Third)

weight.description: Regular body; medium for emphasis; semibold labels; bold for hero/alert

lineHeight.description: Tight for big headlines; snug for subheads; normal for body

spacing.description: 4px base grid (Tailwind-aligned); use 4–6 for micro, 8–12 for blocks, 16+ for sections

shadow.description: Subtle, soft shadows — no heavy drop shadows

layout.description: Centered content; 72rem for page, 64rem for text-heavy blocks

primary.role: Main question and main answer — above the fold, F-pattern top

secondary.role: Controls and summary — what users use to act and understand at a glance

quaternary.role: Navigation and meta — present but not competing
